About

Representing artists who make the music

ARCWORC is a Cape Town based artist management company built around one core belief: that the music comes first. We represent artists who are deeply embedded in the culture they create for, and our role is to make sure that culture reaches as far and as authentically as it deserves to.

We work with a carefully chosen roster of electronic music artists, providing strategic direction, booking support, and the relationships needed to build sustainable international careers. Every decision we make is grounded in the artist's identity and long term vision, not short term momentum.

Our artists have earned genuine support from some of the most respected names in the global scene. Not through campaigns or shortcuts, but through consistent, honest work and a clear musical point of view. That authenticity is something we protect in everything we do.

Services

What we do

From the first conversation to the main stage, ARCWORC provides a full suite of services to support artists at every stage of their career. We are partners, not middlemen.

01

Artist Management

Day to day career guidance, long term strategic planning, and the kind of honest partnership that helps artists make decisions that serve their vision and not just the moment.

02

Booking and Touring

Securing the right shows in the right rooms. We focus on bookings that build genuine audience relationships, from Cape Town club nights to international festival stages.

03

Brand Development

Helping artists define and communicate who they are. We work across visual identity, press materials, and artist positioning to ensure the presentation matches the music.

04

Industry Relations

Connecting artists with labels, platforms, promoters, and peers who share their values. Relationships built on credibility, not cold outreach.

05

Press and Media

Crafting the narrative around an artist's work and getting it in front of the right audiences through editorial features, playlist pitching, and media coordination.

06

Event Production

Curating and producing events that reflect the culture our artists come from. From intimate showcases to large scale afro-electronic events under the ARCWORC Presents banner.

ARCWORC Presents

Events we curate

ARCWORC Presents is the events arm of our company. We create spaces where afro-electronic music is experienced the way it was meant to be. Rooted in culture, curated with intention, and open to everyone who feels it.

01
